# (MotK) Morwen Steelsheen ◆

> [!note] 📖 Hero · Threat: **6** · Lore
> **WP** 2  ·  **ATK** 0  ·  **DEF** 2  ·  **HP** 2

*Rohan. Gondor. Noble.*

---

**Action**: Put Morwen Steelsheen into play from your hand. Then, discard a **_Rohan_** or **_Gondor_** ally you control.
**Response**: After a **_Rohan_** or **_Gondor_** ally leaves play, exhaust Morwen Steelsheen to either heal 2 damage from a character or reduce your threat by 1.
